positive: A stylized and vibrant depiction of a celestial forest at twilight. The main subject is a cluster of glowing bioluminescent flora and fauna, including stylized mushrooms, glowing fox silhouettes, and intertwined cosmic vines. The composition must be centrally balanced and highly detailed, rendered in a smooth vector-art style with sharp lines and strong negative space. Use a deep sapphire blue and nebula purple color palette, accented by neon emerald and gold highlights. The overall mood is whimsical, mystical, and high-contrast, suitable for apparel printing. The style should mimic modern graphic novel illustration meets high-end psychedelic art, optimized for repeating surface patterns or central motif application. Studio lighting, crisp details, clean silhouettes, no gradients or smudging.
negative: text, watermark, signature, copyright, logo, blurry, smudge, low resolution, artifacts, bad anatomy, deformed, extra limbs, noisy, gradient, photorealism
